scripts.build: node ../../script/prepare-extension-sdk.mjs && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.mjs --target=node --format=esm --packages=bundle --external sharp --external libreoffice-convert && bun ../../script/validate-extension-bundle.ts --file ./dist/index.mjs --extension multimodal --allow sharp --allow libreoffice-convert
